keyEvents.text: Goal!  Barbados 0, Haiti 1. Louicius Deedson (Haiti) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Duckens Nazon.
Nicoli Brathwaite (Barbados) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Rommel Bynoe (Barbados) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Barbados 0, Haiti 2. Duke Lacroix (Haiti) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Danley Jean Jacques.
Substitution, Barbados. Nadre Butcher replaces Rommel Bynoe.
Substitution, Haiti. Belmar Joseph replaces Léverton Pierre.
Substitution, Haiti. Bryan Labissiere replaces Frantzdy Pierrot.
Substitution, Haiti. Mikaël Cantave replaces Louicius Deedson.
Substitution, Barbados. Shay Prescod replaces Sheran Hoyte.
Goal!  Barbados 1, Haiti 2. Niall Reid-Stephen (Barbados) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Barbados. Khalil Vanderpool-Nurse replaces Niall Reid-Stephen.
Substitution, Barbados. Devonte Richards replaces Hadan Holligan.
Substitution, Barbados. Elijah Downey replaces Tajio James.
Substitution, Haiti. Carl Sainté replaces Fafá Picault.
Goal!  Barbados 1, Haiti 3. Bryan Labissiere (Haiti) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the top left corner. Assisted by Mikaël Cantave   following a fast break.
Belmar Joseph (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Haiti. Christopher Attys replaces Danley Jean Jacques.
